title: Lead Data Scientist - Fraud Detection
description: PayShield Security (Series B, $45M raised) is looking for a Lead Data Scientist to own our fraud detection ML platform end-to-end. You will set technical direction, mentor 2 junior data scientists, and drive the roadmap for our transaction risk scoring systems. Requirements: 5+ years in production ML, deep experience with XGBoost and supervised/unsupervised hybrid pipelines, hands-on experience shipping fraud models. Bonus: experience with anomaly detection, behavioral profiling, or fintech fraud. Stack: Python, XGBoost, AWS SageMaker, Kafka. Location: Tel Aviv (hybrid, 3 days onsite).

title: Senior ML Engineer - Recommendations
description: ShopStream is a consumer e-commerce platform with 5M active users. We're looking for a Senior ML Engineer to build and improve our product recommendation engine. You will develop collaborative filtering and content-based models, A/B test ranking algorithms, and optimize click-through rates. Stack: Python, TensorFlow, BigQuery, GCP. Location: Tel Aviv (hybrid).

title: Senior Data Scientist - Computer Vision
description: VisionAI Labs is building the next generation of visual inspection systems for manufacturing. We are hiring a Senior Data Scientist specializing in computer vision to join our London headquarters. Responsibilities include developing CNN-based defect detection models, optimizing inference pipelines for edge devices, and publishing research. Relocation to London is required. Remote work is not available for this role.
